# .env Template
#
# To generate a safe configuration, you can run npm run env:generate
# to safely populate the values below.

# Better Auth Token
BETTER_AUTH_TOKEN=YOUR_TOKEN_GOES_HERE

# PostgreSQL Database User (Default: postgres)
POSTGRES_USER=postgres

# PostgreSQL Password (Default: mypassword)
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=mypassword

# PostgreSQL Database Name (Default: jippy)
POSTGRES_DB=jippy

# PostgreSQL Full Database URL
# Note: Do not edit
POSTGRES_URL=postgres://${POSTGRES_USER}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB}?schema=public

# Redis URL
#
# To enable redis, set the Redis URL value here. This is used for caching
# route for faster response times. (Default: "redis://localhost:6379")
# REDIS_URL=REDIS_URL_GOES_HERE

# Cache Lifetime
#
# Requires REDIS_URL to be set. This sets the lifetime of the route cache.
# Value is time in minutes. (Default: 30)
# REDIS_CACHE_LIFETIME=30
